title: analytics_schema_v1
description: Alias for analytics_schema_medium — event-level Ta-1/2/3 surface.

medication_class.description: Ta-1: pharmacologic class attribution (SSRI, SNRI, NDRI, etc.).

symptom_categories.description: Ta-2: coarse symptom category tags for adverse-event analytics.

side_effect_signal.description: Ta-2: binary side-effect / adverse-event detection signal.

adherence_signal.description: Ta-3: adherence friction signal (barrier vs none).

time_bucket.description: Ta-3: diurnal time bucket for adherence-pattern analytics.
